reasoning: Look, I'm standing here and I know exactly what's going to happen. I vote for Shantanu in 2019 thinking he's different, thinking the BJP will change things, and five years later I'm still failing the WBPSC exam, my wife still makes 8,000 a month, and my cousin's corruption payment for that peon job—it's still the system. Whether it's Shantanu or Biswajit Das, whether it's BJP raids or TMC scandals, nothing changes for someone like me. The temple, the certificates, the tamasha—it's all window dressing. I won't lie and pretend Biswajit or the Left care about me either. NOTA is the only honest thing I can do today, because I'm done fooling myself that any of these people will fix the system I'm actually stuck in.
primary_drivers: Complete loss of faith in both major parties after 2019-2024 cycle
Personal stagnation unchanged despite political upheaval and promises
Rejection of what he sees as political theater while real corruption persists
